notes.label: Players included
notes.value: 582 (all players with logged minutes in regular season 2025-26)

notes.label: USG%
notes.value: Usage Rate — share of team possessions used while on floor

notes.label: ORB% / DRB% / REB%
notes.value: Percentage of available rebounds grabbed while on floor

notes.label: AST%
notes.value: Percentage of teammate FGs assisted while on floor

notes.label: ORtg / DRtg
notes.value: Points produced / allowed per 100 possessions while on floor

notes.label: PIE
notes.value: Player Impact Estimate (NBA.com's overall impact metric)

notes.label: PER, BPM, VORP, total Win Shares (WS) and Offensive Win Shares (OWS) are
Basketball Reference's proprietary calculations and are not present in the
NBA.com/stats source. PIE and Net Rating serve a similar role as overall
impact metrics; DWS is included. If you need PER/BPM/VORP specifically,
basketball-reference.com would need to be allow-listed for direct access.
Position is the player's most common starting position (G/F/C). Players
who never started a game show no position.

glossary.USG%: Usage Rate — share of team possessions used while on floor
glossary.ORB% / DRB% / REB%: Percentage of available rebounds grabbed while on floor
glossary.AST%: Percentage of teammate FGs assisted while on floor
glossary.ORtg / DRtg: Points produced / allowed per 100 possessions while on floor
glossary.PIE: Player Impact Estimate (NBA.com's overall impact metric)

source_meta.players_included: 582 (all players with logged minutes in regular season 2025-26)
